p2p_enrichment.notes: Added repo CI syntax checks as pass_to_pass gates: test_repo_syntax_glm4moe_lite, test_repo_syntax_model_provider. The repo's CI uses ruff, pytest, and pre-commit hooks but these require dependencies not available in the container. Syntax checks via py_compile work and validate the Python files parse correctly. Tests verified passing on base commit with gold patch applied.

p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 new pass_to_pass CI tests: test_repo_ruff_check (ruff linting passes), test_repo_plugin_contracts (plugin contract tests pass). Improved mocking setup for megatron and transformers. Docker build succeeded. All 5 p2p tests verified passing on base commit.
